articles.author: Victoria Song
articles.title: The promises and pitfalls of personalized health - The Verge
articles.description: While health tech companies are chasing personalized health, the reality is algorithms and features don’t really take chronic conditions into account.
articles.content: The promises and pitfalls of personalized health Personalized health is the holy grail, but theres a long way to go before algorithms can factor in chronic cond… [+11257 chars]
